name: io.github.publicdotcom/publicdotcom-mcp-server
title: Public.com Trading API
description: Connect AI assistants to your Public.com brokerage account. Trade stocks, options, and crypto — get quotes, manage orders, and view your portfolio.

environment_variables.name: PUBLIC_COM_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Your Public.com API secret key. Get one at https://public.com/settings/v2/api

environment_variables.name: PUBLIC_COM_ACCOUNT_ID
environment_variables.description: Default account ID. Optional — if not set, the server will prompt for it.
